title: Opening for Software Engineer at Grofers

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Grofers
jsonLd.description:
Join the Grofers family as a Software Engineer in Nashik. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Grofers:
Grofers is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers!
